study_group_representative.quote: Here, we analyse confirmed cases identified by the Shenzhen CDC between Jan 14 and Feb 12, 2020, and close contacts of cases confirmed before Feb 9, 2020.

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: 391 cases of COVID-19 and 1286 of their close contacts

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: As of Feb 22, 2020, final clinical outcomes were known for 228 of 391 cases in our data

follow_up_length_reported.quote: Close contacts and travellers from Hubei who tested negative were quarantined at home or a central facility, and monitored for 14 days.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Suspected cases and close contacts were tested for SARS-CoV-2 by RT-PCR of nasal swabs at 28 qualified local hospitals, ten district-level CDCs, and two third-party testing organisations, with final confirmation done at the Guangdong Provincial Center for Disease Control and Prevention

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: In multiple conditional logistic regression analysis of contact types, household contact (OR 6·3; 95% CI 1·5–26·3) and travelling together (OR 7·1; 1·4–34·9) were significantly associated with infection

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: The relative odds of transmission among contacts of various types were estimated by use of conditional logistic regression and random-effects models, to account for differing numbers of possible infected individuals in each risk group.
